name: Luxury Jewelry & Loan
description_short: E-Z Cash Pawn Shop Inc. operates three locations across Columbus, OH, offering collateral-based loans, gold and jewelry buying, and quick cash services.
description_long: E-Z Cash Pawn Shop Inc. is an established pawn shop operator with three retail locations serving the Columbus, Ohio metropolitan area. The company holds active licensing (PB.100220.000, PB.100220.005-BR, PB.100220.002-BR), indicating compliance with Ohio pawn shop regulations. With locations on the East side (3210 E Main St), West side (3655 West Broad St), and Downtown (517 E. Livingston Ave), the company provides geographic accessibility across Columbus. The business model centers on traditional pawn shop services, which typically include collateral-based lending, jewelry and precious metals buying, and quick-cash transactions for customers needing immediate funds. E-Z Cash maintains consistent operating hours across locations (generally 9:00am-6:00pm Monday-Saturday), suggesting a stable, established operation. The multi-location presence indicates the business has achieved sufficient scale and profitability to maintain three separate storefronts rather than operating as a single location. Unlike payday lenders or title loan companies that focus on short-term unsecured debt, pawn shops like E-Z Cash provide asset-based lending where borrowers retain the option to reclaim items by repaying the loan. This model can be preferable for consumers who own valuable items and want to preserve their ownership while accessing emergency funds. The straightforward website lists basic location and hours information without extensive marketing or service descriptions, which is typical for established neighborhood-based pawn operations that rely on walk-in traffic and community familiarity. E-Z Cash appears positioned as a reliable, consistent option for Columbus-area residents seeking quick cash through collateral lending or looking to sell jewelry and precious metals.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Three convenient locations across Columbus (East, West, and Downtown) reducing travel burden
Extended hours (up to 9:00am-6:00pm) accommodate working customers
Licensed and regulated pawn shop with state compliance documentation visible
Established business model allowing customers to reclaim pawned items by repaying loans
No credit check required, making it accessible to customers with poor or no credit history
Quick cash availability without underwriting delays typical of personal loans
Option to sell jewelry and precious metals for immediate cash if customer prefers not to reclaim items
cons: High effective interest rates on pawn loans (typically 120-240% APR depending on loan term and state regulations)
Risk of losing valuable personal items if unable to repay loan by maturity date
Limited loan amounts based on item appraisal value, may be insufficient for larger cash needs
Website provides minimal information about interest rates, loan terms, or specific services offered
Loans are short-term (typically 30-120 days), creating pressure to repay quickly or lose collateral
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history needing emergency cash without credit checks
Individuals with valuable jewelry, watches, or electronics seeking quick liquidity
People who own collectibles or precious metals and want to monetize them directly
Customers seeking alternatives to payday loans when they have valuable collateral available
diagnosis: E-Z Cash Pawn Shop is best for Columbus-area residents who own valuable items and need emergency cash without credit qualification. The main caveat is that pawn loans carry high effective interest rates and carry real risk of losing collateral if repayment cannot be made within the loan term.
services: Pawn loans secured by jewelry, watches, and personal items
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
